plays.story: Between Earth and Sky novels are coming to TTRPG courtesy of Monte Cook Games

angles.bizzal-games: 'Monte Cook Just Turned a Fantasy Novel Series Into a Playable Setting — First Look at the Between Earth and Sky Mechanics' — dig into what system it's built on, what new player options/backgrounds the novels introduce, and whether the crunch does the source justice.
angles.itsalreadywritten: 'The Books Come First: How Between Earth and Sky's Novels Are Shaping Its New TTRPG' — frame it as page-to-table adaptation, spotlighting the authors, the world's literary roots, and what fans of the novels should expect (and fear) from the tabletop version.

plays.story: GODZILLA comes to Marvel Multiverse Roleplaying

angles.bizzal-games: 'Godzilla Joins the Marvel Multiverse RPG — How Do You Even Statblock a Kaiju?' — mechanical deep-dive on scale rules, damage thresholds, and how MMRPG handles a monster that dwarfs its usual superhero cast.
angles.itsalreadywritten: 'Two Franchises, One Multiverse: What Godzilla's Marvel RPG Crossover Means for Canon' — angle on IP mashup lore, how Toho's mythology gets folded into Marvel continuity, and what it signals for licensed-fiction tabletop crossovers going forward.

plays.story: Seven Malicious Vite npm Packages Use Blockchain C2 to Deliver a RAT

angles.itsalreadypriced: 'Malware Is Now Hiding Its Command Server on the Blockchain — What That Means for Crypto's 'Immutable' Reputation' — explore how attackers are weaponizing on-chain data as unkillable C2 infrastructure, and what it does to the narrative that blockchain transparency is inherently a security win.
angles.itsalreadywhen: 'Seven npm Packages, One Blockchain Backdoor: Inside the Vite Supply-Chain RAT Campaign' — technical breakdown of the attack chain, why blockchain-based C2 is nearly impossible to take down, and what dev teams should audit in their npm dependencies right now.

plays.story: MacOS malware hijacks Telegram sessions, targets crypto wallets: SlowMist

angles.itsalreadypriced: 'Your Mac's Telegram App Could Be Bleeding Your Crypto Wallet Dry' — practical warning piece for crypto holders on which wallets/session flows are exposed and immediate steps to lock down Telegram-linked accounts.
angles.itsalreadywhen: 'SlowMist Cracks Open a New macOS Session-Hijacking Malware Targeting Telegram' — technical walkthrough of the hijacking mechanism, macOS keychain/session weaknesses exploited, and detection indicators for defenders.
